<Feature id="checkout" name="Checkout Flow">
  End-to-end purchase flow from cart through payment confirmation.

  <Actor id="guest-user" name="Guest User"
    description="Unauthenticated visitor browsing or in early checkout"
  />
  <Actor id="member-user" name="Authenticated Member"
    description="User with a verified account and payment method on file"
  />

  <Outcome id="checkout-cvr" name="Checkout Conversion Rate"
    metric="conversion_rate"
    baseline="68%"
    target="75%"
    timeframe="30d"
    owner="checkout-pm"
  />

  <Section id="cart-section" name="Shopping Cart">
    Manages cart state before a user begins payment.
    <Definition id="cart-item" name="Cart Item" version="1.0.0">
      Canonical line-item contract for checkout calculations.
      <Field name="productId" type="string" required />
      <Field name="quantity" type="number" required min={1} max={99} />
      <Field name="price" type="number" required />
      <Field name="currency" type="enum" values="USD,EUR,GBP,KRW" required />
    </Definition>
    <Policy id="max-quantity" name="Max Quantity Policy"
      trigger="cart.item.add"
      actor="guest-user member-user"
      rule="A single cart item cannot exceed 99 units"
      enforcement="must"
    >
      Prevent oversized orders that violate fulfillment constraints.
      <Logic id="max-qty-guard" name="Quantity Guard">
        If requested quantity exceeds 99, reject the update and return a validation error.
      </Logic>
    </Policy>
    <Constraint id="positive-price" name="Positive Price"
      condition="price must be greater than 0"
      actor="guest-user member-user"
    >
      Every cart item price must remain positive.
    </Constraint>
    <Scenario id="sc-cart-limit" name="Cart at capacity"
      given="A cart containing exactly 99 items"
      when="The user attempts to set quantity to 100 on a cart item"
      then="The system rejects the update and returns QUANTITY_EXCEEDED"
      policy="max-quantity"
      actor="guest-user"
    />
  </Section>

  <Section id="payment-section" name="Payment">
    Payment capture and tokenized authorization workflows.
    <Definition id="payment-method" name="Payment Method" version="1.0.0">
      Supported payment instruments and token payload.
      <Field name="type" type="enum" values="credit_card,paypal,apple_pay" required />
      <Field name="token" type="string" required />
    </Definition>
  </Section>

  <Link id="cart-payment-link" from="cart-section" to="payment-section" relationship="depends-on">
    Cart must be finalized before payment can proceed.
  </Link>
</Feature>
